reviews.review_description:
I'm a big fan of the shooter genre. I've played SuperHot and Pistol Whip ad nauseam. I specifically love stationary or games on rails. The movement in VR via thumbsticks feels  weird, so with that in mind I went looking for a "Time Crisis" like game. I initially found Crisis Brigade 2 which is great in it's own way but didn't have that arcade punch I was looking for. Happy to have stumbled upon this one. It's just challenging enough and the devs have done a good job of keeping me wanting more, and to finish levels better and faster. 

I hope they continue and there's a Aim Assault 2 in the future.

reviews.review_title: the greatest light gun game of all time.
reviews.review_description:
Aim assault is a love letter to classic light gun games and it perfects the formula in vr.

The graphics are fantastic and impressive amount of every level is destructible, making the action chaotic and exciting.
The levels are meticulous with good pacing and lots of secrets for replayability. 

I’ve played this game over and over again and I can’t help but have a big grin in my face challenging myself to do better with every play through.

This is one of the best rail shooters in VR. It is made in the style of truly great arcade games such as: Time Crisis, The House of the Dead, Heavy Fire, Blue Estate, and Operation Wolf. It also reminds me of great VR hits like: Pistol Whip and Crossfire Sierra Squad on PSVR2.

The game does have a very good visual effects, and the best environmental destruction system in the shooters on the Meta Quest 3 platform. Sometimes it reminds me of the lobby shootout scene from the "The Matrix" movie. Eviromental distructions looks just amazing as well as gameplay in this game.

The story is very good. Fun and exciting gameplay, together with greate visual effects and impressive environmental destruction, make this game a true gem in the sea of VR games!

I recommend it to everyone who loves good action games.

P.S.
There is a free Demo version of this game, so try it before buying and make sure I’m telling the truth :)


To developers:
Thanks for a great game!
But it would be wonderful if you added a co-op mode in the future. And also if you could optimize the performance a little more in some scenes.

Thank you.

The game is great, shooting feels good, it is not as difficult as some say, it is challenging but not super hard, on normal difficulty, one detail i did notice, i believe the player hitbox might be a bit too big, i found myself being hit by bullets i can clearly see i dodged, just something to keep in mind.
The time limit thing. Come on. Make it at least optional. The game is super cool but the whole time limit really puts a damper on it.

The game was fun until it started imposing ridiculous time limits, even on the easiest mode.

I’ll re-review this game if they remove the time limits, at least on Easy.

I get that Time Crisis was designed to be hard to steal your quarters, but I paid full price for this. I should at least be able to play through the campaign casually on Easy.
I'm a huge time crisis fan and this does a great job at capturing the feel of time crisis.
Make a super easy mode for kids!

reviews.review_title: Why does it have to be so difficult??
reviews.review_description: This game is blistering difficult even on easy mode! Why can't easy just be easy? I looked forward to this game for months & could barely contain myself when it became available but I haven't played it since day 1..😪 I just don't feel like working that dang hard to have fun... SUCKS! Too bad cause it looks great & plays great. Everything I wanted sans difficulty. I'm sure loads of people will love it. Unfortunately,  I'm out.. 💩

Time crisis like! Enough said, one of the best light gun experiences if you gamed in the golden age. Would like to see the developer add better tracking of parrots, skulls, and watermelon. Only can see how many you have collected at the end of each level so when trying to collect them all it’s hard to know which levels have X remaining. Would also be good to know where these collectables are, it’s a bit of luck when you get them but also some are impossible to even find. A map or something could be nice somehow or hints. Amazing game devs

Nostalgia brought me to this game, in a search for that on the rails shooter feeling I was presently surprised at how much this brought back those happy days in front of a CRT TV at-home, really does feel like time crisis. Now if only namco would see the opportunity and port time crisis 4. Also a remastered Die hard 2 on the rails shooter etc etc

Way too hard, easy should mean easy 
 it's just not fun and it's a shame as I was really looking forward to this game

reviews.review_title: Best Time Crisis Clone out there
reviews.review_description: Here it is! I had high hopes for this title after the brilliant demo, and my expectations were even exceeded. I've only been playing for a little over an hour and I'm already completely hooked. The best Time Crisis clone ever in VR. This game easily steals the throne from Crisis Brigade 2 or Under Cover.

This is a great pick up and play arcade shooter. On normal it’s challenging and I have to try a few times to beat the level, but that’s what makes it so rewarding as you learn and improve your aim. If you enjoy light gun games and perfecting your scores this is highly recommend.
It’s fun, but for novice players there isn’t much in the way of forgiveness, it the game is a little too tough with limited lifes, you really a couple more to get full enjoyment.

reviews.review_title: Liked it so much I bought it twice!
reviews.review_description: Got it on steam first, decided I wanted it portable and got it here too. I’ll repeat my suggestions from my steam review; more ways to reload such as pointing up to reload and if possible manual reloading would be great. Also more sighting options for the Claw like blacked out rear sights and a version of it with a slide mounted red dot would be awesome. If DLC is released I’ll definitely purchase it. Thumbs up! 👍
The game is great for what's offered. I do hope to see more added levels and modes in the future!

If you are of an age to have loved Time Crisis either on arcade or early PlayStation (using an old CRT screen of course) then this is The One. You feel it from the first second and juts gets better. 

Yes more levels would be nice, yes multiplayer would be great. But for the price of of 3 beers this is just amazing. It's on rails, it channels that late 90s arcade vibe. It's a nostalgia trip into the light gun heyday. The destructive landscape is extra sweet. 

And it's in VR!!

You know that bit in When Harry Met Sally? Yeah, that's me right now (look it up anyone younger than Gen X :)

even just playing in easy mode
it still so hard and too far for the check point

Awesome arcade shooter, great graphics and attention to detail, guns feel amazing and accurate.  The king of this genre in my opinion as it is the most accurate, best looking and most fun to play against its peers.  Great job and can’t wait for more content.  This doesn’t even show up in the new releases on the quest app page which is not fair to this game or the development team.  Great game and thank you for bringing this to us it’s absolutely bad a$$. !!

I have played this game so much in the last few days.  It's truly addicting especially with the leaderboards as you strive to get the top spot.   The game is smooth and runs great on the Quest 3.  The difference between PC and standalone is not much at all.  These developers did an amazing job on both versions of the game.  This is a must have for your Quest library!

Amazing game I just wish that when they do add more levels they give us some more scenes like shooting out of a boat chase or a car chase shooting out of the car like in blood and Truth as well as the beginning of Deadpool I urge them to take a look at the driving scenes of these games or segments because they are amazing and I can see how it would play wonderfully with aim assault levels I know they have wonderful ideas and I'm truly impressed it almost felt like I was playing blood and Truth which is one of my favorite VR games it gave me that same feeling but in the standalone headset and I got to tell you but all those who don't have it please when I don't get it immediately if you enjoy amazing shooters congratulations to all those who worked on this project please continue bringing us more levels such as what is explained up top I appreciate your hard work and look forward to continuing aim assault I have already completed it I urge all those who haven't to do the same black shadow signing out

This game is fantastic! The game developers seem to have put their heart into it! I love this game, it reminds me a bit of Virtual Cop.Thank you! This game 10/10 (The game supports k3d gun  )search: K3design point store
WHY is it so HARD... Been playing this on the EASIEST level all week and I can't get pass the FIRST Level !!!!...the Airplane scene....its RIDICULOUSLY Hard!!!

You'll be doing a lot of ducking, weaving, and squatting if you want to be good at this game! People keep comparing it to Time Crisis but it's more hardcore than that, since there is less cover and you need to physically dodge bullets with your body (no slow motion like Superhot, you have to be Neo!).

Great game, based on the leaderboards there aren't nearly enough people matching my skill level, so step up!

I made a video of all the stages in the hardcore one-gun mode, check it out:

https://youtu.be/XflS5LBprz8

Just buy it, you won’t be disappointed. 
Can’t stop playing this game. Hope there more to come with it. Maybe more levels, zombie, guns, and a few tweaks here and there and this game is dam near perfect.
Yes, this is arguably the best Time-Crisis-style experience on Quest. No attempt at realism here — just nonstop action that gets crazier with every level. An absolute hit.
Plays fantastic, just like the old lightgun madness like virtua cop.

reviews.review_title: Like stepping inside an arcade shooter!
reviews.review_description: So fun! Very realistic. Love the weapons.
It fun.
Games fun engaging and exciting can't wait to for the next update

Congratulations to the developers, it's a great game, pure action and fun.

Must admit that I would have appreciated a co-op option, it would have been even better.

Perhaps in Aim Assault 2 ?

Would buy it instantly.

reviews.review_title: Great ode to Time Crisis and Virtua Cop
reviews.review_description:
Controls are responsive and little to no lag on my quest 2. Graphics and set pieces are really neat, especially when you are extracting hostages. There are challenge modes like target shooting and leaderboards, night vision mode missions. 

My only complaint and reason for 4 star is game is very short and the levels are shorter than crisis vrigade or dead second. If you like either of those games, buy this one, it’s sooo much fun. 

Fingers crossed for more content
But it does get hard. That’s what she …

Simple old skool fun 

Great looking ..smooth as butter ...pure nostalgia & great for sharpening your reflexes & hand to eye coordination 

And sooooooooooooooooo addictive !!!!! 🤣🤣🤣🤣


Great job all involved 

Carl 👊😎🔥

This game is awesome!

Would love the devs to do a house of the dead clone next!

reviews.review_title: I can't pass the second level!
reviews.review_description: Enemies are all of the sudden invincible and I can't do anything about it. The game was fun up until the bullet sponges arrived  😩

The "on rails shooter" genre is a good fit for VR, & this one is excellent. The amount of content is reflected in the price- & I think it's good value. Shame the PC version isnt on the PC Quest app (only on Steam), because I'd like to try that too. The framerate on Quest 3 can drop in busy scenes, not enough to spoil the game- but I expect the PC version will perform better.

reviews.review_title: Best time crisis since, well, time crisi
reviews.review_description:
Excellent game, it's fun and really captures the old school vibe of playing time crisis in the arcades.
Challenges modes are also a nice addition. BUT the last level "jaguar" is truly awful and doesn't feel like it was designed by the same person, waaaay too long and convoluted. And they could have done better than using AI for their lvl art. Still 5 stars for keeping the spirit of time crisis alive.

This is awesome..a proper old light gun style game..the best one in vr yet. Its a challenge too,but not too much of a challenge..a loada levels and mini games in there..well worth the money.easy recommendation
Worth the price. The only thing they need to improve is to have similar gameplay with time crisis like be able to duck into cover (manual or using remote)  and have environmental covers
It was a great success, and I'm very happy to have acquired this masterpiece. I hope that future development will involve more collaboration among developers.
Yep. This rules.
Why can’t I have full auto guns until I beat the whole game 😤
